title: Policy Simulation Scenario
description: Validates a single scenario document for ao_kernel.policy_sim. Scenarios live under policy_sim_scenarios/*.v1.json (bundled) or under a workspace override. See docs/POLICY-SIM.md and PR-B4 plan v3 §2.2/§2.9 for semantics.

scenario_id.description: Stable id used in reports. Lowercase + digits + underscore only.

kind.description: executor_primitive: invokes build_sandbox + resolve_allowed_secrets + check_http_header_exposure against policy_worktree_profile. governance_policy: invokes check_policy against target_policy_name. combined: both.

target_policy_name.description: Policy file the scenario evaluates. Required for executor_primitive and governance_policy kinds. Must be a key in proposed_policies OR baseline_overrides OR bundled defaults.

target_policy_names.description: Required for kind=combined. One entry per primitive invoked by the scenario.

adapter_manifest_ref.description: Adapter id resolved against the pre-simulation AdapterRegistry snapshot (load_bundled() + load_workspace(project_root)).

parent_env.description: Environment variables presented to build_sandbox / resolve_allowed_secrets.

requested_command.description: Optional command for validate_command probes (gated by --enable-host-fs-probes).

requested_cwd.description: Ephemeral sentinel path; validate_cwd is excluded from v1 simulator per §2.3.

action.description: Action string passed to check_policy for governance_policy scenarios.

violations_expected.description: Ordered list of violation kind codes expected under the baseline policy.
